title: Products
instruction_1: In this section you can manage the articles/products that will be published on the website.
instruction_2: Each product must belong to a category in order to be displayed to the public.
instruction_3: In addition, each product can contain the attributes that a category can offer.
instruction_4: You can manage all items by entering the corresponding category in the top bar of this section.
editor_cancel_title: Do you want to cancel the edition?
editor_save_title: Do you want to save this product?
editor_save_message: Make sure all the information is correct before continuing
editor_remove_title: Do you want to delete this product?
editor_remove_image: Do you want to delete this image?
editor_recove_image: Do you want to recover this image?
editor_remove_category: Do you want to delete this category?
editor_remove_attribute: Do you want to delete this attribute?
can_restore_later: You can get it back later
editor_disable_message: This will disable the product and it will not be visible to the public, but it will be saved in the database.
editor_delete_message: Once deleted, it cannot be recovered and any records related to this product will be lost.
editor_invalid_price: The product must have a price greater than 0
editor_invalid_name: The product must have a name
no_products_in_category: There are no articles in this category yet.
